title: Rain Falls on Alabasta
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on a kingdom wakes from war. Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
scene: This scene belongs to the A Kingdom Wakes from War sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, Luffy, King Cobra, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We've lost quite a bit of time!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't look at them, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Praying won't help us in this situation!

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: We need everyone for this last job!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I have been to work with the

summary: Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
